message:
fix(mux): fix consistent layout heights, restore titles on reload

- Fix titlebar/toolbar using fixed heights (28px/40px) so emoji titles
  don't cause layout shifts that change panel dimensions
- Use visibility:hidden instead of display:none for fullscreen hide so
  bars always occupy layout space
- Apply panel titles from PANEL_LIST message after layout restoration
  so tab titles persist across page reload
- Remove setTimeout from reconnect resize path for consistent timing
